_note: OBSERVE-ONLY result/animation selector probe. Goal: capture, for the first time, what a HIT vs MISS vs BLOCK looks like in memory by hooking the result/animation selector at module RVA 0x205210 (.xcode, ASLR-stable; ExpectedBytes 48 89 5C 24 08 48 89 6C 24 10) at ExecuteFirst and logging the EVADE-TYPE byte the caller passes in cl (0x00=hit, 0x04=block/guard, 0x01/2/3=guard variants, 0x06=miss) plus a window of the actor's result RECORD at [r8+0x148] (+0x1BB / +0x1BE result-code / +0x1C0 evade-type-on-record / +0x1C4 damage-shown word / +0x1E5 resultKind bits). Method: same attacker + same evasive target, repeat basic Attack until >=2 HITs and >=2 MISSes, then read the [SELECTOR-PROBE] lines and compare the evadeType byte on hit vs miss vs block. Rewrites/forces NOTHING (pre-clamp hook is fully OFF). Pairs with work/hit-miss-discovery-protocol.md.
